titleStmt.title: SII 15.683: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 683. (B.K. No. 20 of 1927-28.) KARAKIKAṬṬI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Kariyavva temple.

This is dated Śaka 14., Yuva, Śrāvaṇa ba. 1. With the help of the cyclic year the Śaka year can be restored as 1437. Thus the details would correspond to 1515 A.D. July 26. The details cannot, however, be verified.
It records a gift of land to the goddess Uḍachādēvī by Mahāmaṇḍaleśvara Taṟimaleya Kōnērirāju • • • • • Chinnayadēva Mahā-arasu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śaka 14 neya yuva saṁvatsarada śrāva
ṇa bahuḷa 1 dalu śrīmammahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara taṟimaleya kōnēri rāju
ciṁnnayadēva mahāArasugaḷu
kaṟikeyakaṭeya Uḍacādēvige koṭṭa dha
rmma naunāUyige dhārāpū
rvakavāgi kaṟikeyakaṭeya holadoḷage koṭa kariya
bhūmi 11 dēvara kasavapaya bāviya tōḍisidaru
kaṟikekaṭege koṭa bhūmi
holanu dhārāpūrvakavāge koṭeU Ā hola
dalu Āda phala bhōgavanu Uṁḍu sukhadalu dēvare pū
jeyanu māḍikoṁḍu yiru Eṁdu koṭa dharṁma
ṣaśānau . svadatāṁ dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ . paradattānu
pālanaṁ . pūrvadatāpahārēṇa . svadataṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavētu yi kallanu niṁtu hākisidavaru
kaṟikeya komaṇagaṁUḍa sirivaḷala pa
dēva kopaḷada dēvarapūje
siriya benaka sivapana makaḷa makaḷu tapade naḍedu
barabēku Eṁdu koṭa dhaṁrmmaśāsana . yidake tapida
re gōva koṁda pā
paka hōharu maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.683 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
